content.en:
"Let's go!"

Ye Tian put away the cold jade coffin and quickly fled from here.

And after the impact just now, he was not very far from the exit.

He also has a certain understanding of the strength of these Sunset Sect True Ancestors, if he really fights, he is not an opponent, but these True Ancestors can't kill him in one blow.

And like the strange object attack just now, he expected that the true ancestor would only use it once, if he could really use it again, he would have to use the cold jade coffin to resist it again.

Unless it was a terrifying blow from a soul monster, he would not be able to resist it.

But he didn't believe he could be so unlucky!

Besides, he was about to escape, and it was too late for the True Ancestors to kill him even if they tried to kill him again.

"How can it be blocked?"

This true ancestor of the Sunset Sect was stunned.

Under the blow of his strange small sword, absolutely no one under the True Ancestor could stop it, and even if it was resisted with a solid item, the energy attack was enough to annihilate the enemy.

But the cold jade coffin that Ye Tian had just used not only blocked the blow of the strange little sword, but also offset most of the energy, so the impact did not shock Ye Tian.

Otherwise, Ye Tian would still die.

"Damn, what kind of treasure is that cold jade coffin, it can actually block my strange little sword!"

The true ancestor of the Sunset Sect was very unwilling.

He only has one such treasure, he is not distressed about the treasure, anyway, he is going to die, what is the use of asking for treasures, he is just unwilling to kill Ye Tian.

"Stop that true monarch!"

This Sunset Sect True Ancestor sent a message to the other True Ancestors.

Suddenly, the two True Ancestors of the Sunset Sect not far from the entrance tried to stop Ye Tian, but this time they did not use a strange object attack, and Ye Tian rushed out at the cost of being injured.

At the same time, the other Dao Ancestor incarnations also fled one by one, attracting a lot of firepower, which allowed Ye Tian to escape easily, otherwise if more than three Dao Ancestors intercepted him, Ye Tian would not be able to escape.

Ye Tian rushed out of the Sunset Sect, but he didn't immediately run away, but accelerated the time to heal nearby.

Inside the Sunset Sect.

Under the resistance of a large number of True Monarchs and Dao Ancestor incarnations, before an hour had passed, some True Ancestors couldn't bear it.

Rumble!!!

Under the desperate efforts of the three Dao Ancestor incarnations, one of the Sunset Sect True Ancestors was blown up and turned into a blood mist.

With the fall of the first True Ancestor, the other True Ancestors also fell one by one, and at this time, the chance of escaping was greater, and a True Monarch fled from here, and did not look back, but chose to stay away from here.

In their opinion, the Sunset Sect was definitely a place of great terror, and even if there were more opportunities, they would not dare to come in.

When Ye Tian was healing, Chenguang Zhenjun and the others were also released by Ye Tian.

They didn't want to stay here, so after thanking Ye Tian, they hurriedly left here.

Soon, the battle went on for an hour.

At this time, the remaining few true ancestors of the Sunset Sect fell and died one by one under the suppression of the origin and the suppression of heaven and earth, turning into corpses.

In this battle, the Sunset Sect didn't know how many True Monarchs had fallen, and there were corpses everywhere.

It can be said that the real treasures and opportunities here are no longer the Sunset Sect, but belong to the corpses of these true monarchs.

Every True Monarch is worth a lot of money, and you can imagine how high the value of so many True Monarch corpses is.

Shout!

A figure suddenly rushed in from the outside world, and it was Ye Tian, who had just finished healing.

"Close!"

"Close!"

"Close!"

Ye Tian used the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique to continuously collect the corpses of True Monarchs and incorporated them into the internal universe, and the speed of collection was even faster than that of the Dao Ancestor incarnation.

Those surviving Dao Ancestor incarnations were extremely angry when they saw Ye Tian's behavior, but now was not the time to fight, the battle was delayed for a while, and the treasure would be taken away by others.

As a result, everyone joined the ranks of collecting corpses.

Gradually, more people joined in the looting of corpses.

Half an hour passed.

Ye Tian collected a lot of True Monarch corpses, and even grabbed a corpse of the True Ancestor of the Sunset Sect, so he hurriedly left here.

This is indeed not a place to stay for a long time, and it would not be a good thing if the Sunset Sect sent some True Ancestors again.

Before, there were countless True Monarchs to attract firepower, but now there is no True Monarch to attract firepower, once a True Ancestor comes out, he may not be able to escape.

Moreover, if those Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnations made a move on him, it would be very bad.

He really can't beat the incarnation of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor at the moment, and if the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnation makes a move on him, he may be completely out of order.

So, Ye Tian accepted it when he saw it.

When Ye Tian left not long ago, those Dao Ancestor incarnations had basically collected all the corpses of the True Monarch, and seeing that Ye Tian was no longer there, they also put out their plans to trouble Ye Tian.

"Let's go, we can't continue to destroy the Sunset Sect, those thirty True Ancestors should be a warning to us from the top of the Sunset Sect, if we continue to crack the Great Array in the core area of the Sunset Sect, I'm afraid the Sunset Sect will destroy us at all costs!"

The rest of the Dao Ancestor incarnations thought.

Thereupon.

A Famous Dao Ancestor incarnation and the True Monarchs left the Sunset Sect.

Soon after, the entrance to the Sunset Sect slowly healed and vanished.

Of course, the Dao Ancestors were still able to break through the passage, but no one dared to do so.

Sunset Sect, a mysterious space.

The voices of the Sunset Sect Dao Ancestors sounded again.

"Those people have all left, and the Sunset Sect has been saved, but it's a pity that those thirty True Ancestor disciples have been saved!"

"There's no need to regret it, those thirty True Ancestor disciples were originally damaged, and if they were able to keep the Sunset Sect, they could be regarded as worthy of sacrifice!"

"Hmph, the power of this realm has caused us to lose a lot of money to the Sunset Sect, the day we are born, we must find the field back and kill the bloody Chaos Void!"

"Our Sunset Sect is just a fourfold heaven force, let's focus on preserving strength, in this unknown realm, no one knows what the future situation will be, don't be so reckless!"

Gradually, these Dao Ancestors fell silent and stopped discussing, and this trace of consciousness fell asleep again.

----------

Somewhere in the remains of the battlefield.

Ye Tian tore the space and descended, and when he saw that there was no one around, he immediately breathed a sigh of relief.

"This time the harvest is huge, simply bigger than any previous harvest!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he entered the small realm again and began to slowly sort out the harvest.
